name: aimparency
description: Local-first aim management system with a browser UI, background service, and agent tooling for .bowman projects.

scripts.dev:stack: dotenv -e .env -- concurrently -n "BACK,FRNT,GEMI,CLAU,CODE,BROK" -c "blue,green,magenta,cyan,brightBlue,yellow" "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend" "npm run dev:gemini-session" "npm run dev:claude-session" "npm run dev:codex-session" "npm run dev:broker"
scripts.dev:full: dotenv -e .env -- concurrently -n "BACK,FRNT,GEMI,CLAU,CODE,BROK,CLNT,MCP,VOICE" -c "blue,green,magenta,cyan,brightBlue,yellow,white,gray,dim" "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend" "npm run dev:gemini-session" "npm run dev:claude-session" "npm run dev:codex-session" "npm run dev:broker" "npm run dev:broker-client" "npm run dev:mcp" "npm run dev:voice"
scripts.dev:delay: npm run dev:backend:delay & npm run dev:frontend
scripts.start:stack: dotenv -e .env -- concurrently -n "BACK,FRNT,BROK" -c "blue,green,yellow" "npm run start:backend" "npm run start:frontend" "npm run start:broker"
scripts.test:all: npm run test:unit && npm run test:e2e
scripts.test:unit: npm run test:unit:backend && npm run test:unit:frontend && npm run test:unit:shared && npm run test:unit:mcp
scripts.rec-install: npm install && cd packages/shared && npm install && cd ../backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install && cd ../mcp && npm install

author: Aimparency contributors
